name: CONSERVATIVE BROADCAST MEDIA & PUBLISHING, INC.
business: The company is developing wind power generation projects and currently has no revenues. It expects future revenues from these projects after December 31, 2011, subject to additional capital, financing, and turbine supply.

exposures.sentence: The potential future revenues we expect from our wind power generation projects, will not be generated until sometime after the end of our current year, December 31, 2011, perhaps longer, and will require the expenditure of additional capital, obtaining of construction and project debt financing and establishing turbine supply relationships.
